name: Chiaki Matsushita
description: Matsushita is one of the students of class 2-D. She has a quiet older sister type of personality. She is generally kind to all the boys and girls alike, but she does not actively go out to make friends. ~!Chiaki had believed from early on in the first year that Class D had no hopes of ever reaching Class A and thus resigned herself to a carefree school life, never putting in any real effort into her academics. She considers herself to be a major underachiever, believing that she could easily sco

name: Chuu
description: The true captain of the Jolly Devil Six a.k.a. Team Rokuyukai. One of his types of fighting styles is the Drunken Fist. When preforming Drunken Fist he moves with an erratic stumbling motion which, in addition to making him difficult to attack, allows him to move very quickly. He fuses his demon energy with the alcohol to form his Sui Ken, which is a ball of energy he throws at his opponent. The other form of fighting he uses is his favorite type- a Knife Edge Death Match, in which he put his kn

name: Ena Ayase
description: The youngest Ayase sister, Ena is a few years older than Yotsuba and her most frequent playmate. She is sensible for her age and tries to be responsible by recycling and limiting her use of air conditioning. Her attempts to spare Yotsuba's feelings sometimes lead her to make little white lies, such as praising Yotsuba's childish sketches or letting her believe that Miura's cardboard costume is a real robot named Cardbo (in ADV's translation) or Danbo (in Yen's translation) (ダンボー, Danbō), with co

name: Erika
description: **Height:** 162 cm A college student working at Café Latte. She notes that Misaki is strong and picks up work quickly, and claims that it doesn't feel like Misaki is younger than her. She has a tendency to eavesdrop and is described as having a “voice fetish.” She is also proud of her bust. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Eugene Korekishi
description: __Height:__ 170 cm Since childhood, he has been praised by people around him as a genius. He respects his grandmother, who was the only person that treated him as the normal child, but her promise that she will come to see him as a ghost when she dies has not been fulfilled. That's why he doesn't believe in ghosts.

name: Gamma 2

name: Hikaru Kamiki
description: ~!He is the father of Aqua and Ruby.!~ ~!He is later revealed to also be Taiki Himekawa's biological father, having been molested by Airi Himekawa when he was a child before allegedly having her murdered as well by telling her husband about the affair.!~

name: Hina Alucard
description: Hina is a vampire girl who has moved to Japan to explore her love for anime. Her favorite show is Vampire Cross and her favorite character is Mao. Because she grew up very sheltered, she has a lot of trouble making friends. More than anything, she yearns to meet more people to talk about her interests with. She is one of the highest-ranking vampires and is stronger and more powerful than any average vampire. She thinks the idea of biting people is unsanitary and embarrassing and prefers to drink

name: Hiroto Shinohara
description: __Height:__ 172cm A young man who came to Academy Island In order to search for someone. ~!He accidentally beats Saironji Sarasa in a game, and through taking her red star, pretends to be a 7-star!~

name: Ikuko Onabuta
description: The "first commander" of the "SS" committee. She thinks about sex 24/7 every day of the year, and often slacks off from her duties due to this.

name: Itsuki Inubouzaki
description: A first-year in middle school and member of the Hero Club. She is Fuu's younger sister and respects her dearly. Unlike her older sister, Itsuki is very shy and timid. However, she is very kindhearted and enjoys helping people. She also becomes less shy around people she knows, and can even be snarky at times. As a Hero, Itsuki fights with a tambourine-like ring lined with white flowers from which she can fire magical vines. These vines can ensnare and slice through enemies.

name: Jinpei Matsuda
description: Jinpei Matsuda was originally a member of the Tokyo Police bomb squadron. His partner Kenji Hagiwara was killed four years previously by a serial bomber in Shinjuku and he had sworn revenge on the police for the accidental death of his partner. When the killer resurfaced three years ago, Matsuda's superiors, fearing that he would become reckless due to personal interest, transferred him to Megure's department, where he was promptly partnered with Miwako Sato, then a rather new detective. ~!Matsu

name: Jirou Azuma
description: A peculiar high school student that has basic training as a ninja and the unfound ability to speak to animals. Jirou Azuma, the grandson of Toshimasa Azuma, is a cocky kid with a heart for animals. Should Jirou find an animal being bothered or in need of help, he will rush over and fight the people causing trouble. Eventually, he meets a wounded Ragou and brings him in to help him recover. The two butt heads a bit though Jirou does care for him. Upon a near death experience, Ragou fuses with Jir

name: Kana Sakuragi
description: Newly hired magical girl at Magilumiere who has an unusually good memory and a hard working personality. Her shyness made job hunting difficult until she was recruited by Magilumiere.

name: Kazunari Miyoshi
description: He's a member of the Summer Troupe and was invited to the audition by the Director herself. He was originally hired as a graphic designer who created the Mankai Company's website and flyer, but he caught Izumi's eyes as someone with potential for acting. Kazunari can be seen as a frivolous and fashionable young man with excellent communication skills. He is easy to talk to and befriends people quickly. To make new friends, and because he had nothing better to do, he later took Izumi's offer and

name: Kiyoshirou Ushimitsu
description: The second protagonist of Kamisama No Iutoori Ni, and one of the many love interests to our main protagonist Akashi. Ushimitsu is an oddball who has an obsession with being and seeing others in a state between life and a very close death (slow or quick), he is passionate by astronomy and calls those who are worthy of his love stars. He has shown many hints of being bi or at least having a romantic love for boys.
mediaTitles: As the Gods Will: The Second Series
searchTerms: As the Gods Will: The Second Series

name: Koyuki Honami
description: She's the president of Nanahama High School's Aquarium Club. Her peers see her as out of reach, and by behaving in line with that impression others have of her, she feels a little smothered and lonely.
mediaTitles: A Tropical Fish Yearns for Snow
searchTerms: A Tropical Fish Yearns for Snow

name: Kunio Murai
description: The class "jock bully", Kunio Murai is not very bright and loses his temper easily. When Eikichi Onizuka arrives at the Holy Forest Academy, Kunio and his gang (consisting of Kouji Fujiyoshi and Tadaaki Kusano) attempt to kill him several times with seemingly innocent pranks, such as a cockroach planted in his school lunch. The plans backfire (such as Kunio eating the cockroach, instead) and he goes insane, nearly ending up with his face impaled on a pair of razor-sharp scissors. Onizuka then ta

name: Layla Hamilton
description: __Height:__ 173 cm (5'8") An accomplished and seasoned performer. She is a stubborn character and plays an antagonist-like role in the beginning of the story, but eventually befriends Sora. Layla is the daughter of Mr. Hamilton, a wealthy hotel chain owner; he would prefer Layla to be an actress and frequently tries to push her into doing so. Layla loves Kaleido Stage because she clearly remembers how much the shows made her father and now-deceased mother smile.
mediaTitles: Kaleido Star: New Wings Extra Stage
searchTerms: Kaleido Star: New Wings Extra Stage

name: Lee Eul
description: ~!Lee Eul or by birth name Ryu Min Hyuk is 30 years old man and protagonist of the Manhwa called Annarasumanara. He was born in Seoul, where he went to school and ranked first place due to his good grades. Yet soon he would drop out and receive treatment for his mental illness, which was due to the high pressure his family and teacher as a police officer implies.
